title: Ultimate PVP Config
description: Modpack that has Simply Optimized (credit for the performance mods) and pvp mods, designed for 1.9+ pvp.
body:
# Ultimate PVP Config

PVP modpack designed for 1.9+ pvp. Modpack has most mods one may want for pvp. **Note that not all mods are allowed in every single McTiers Tierlist.**

Credit to [Simply Optimized](https://modrinth.com/modpack/sop) for the performance mods.

## Included Mods
- AppleSkin by squeek502
- BadOptimizations by thosea
- Better Ping Display by vladmarica
- BetterHurtCam by uku
- Cloth Config API by shedaniel
- Concurrent Chunk Management Engine by ishland
- Crosshair Addons Public by Walksy
- Entity Culling by tr7zw
- Fabric API by modmuss50
- FerriteCore by malte0811
- Gamma Utils by Sjouwer
- ImmediatelyFast by RaphiMC
- Lithium by jellysquid3
- Mod Menu by Terraformers
- ModernFix by embeddedt
- More Culling by FX
- No Chat Reports by Aizistral
- Noisium by Steveplays
- Shield Statuses by Walksy
- Shulker Box Tooltip by MisterPeModder
- Sodium by jellysquid3
- Sprint After Death by SmajloSlovakian
- Text Placeholder API by Patbox
- ThreadTweak by getchoo
- TotemCounter by uku
- uku's Armor HUD
- ukulib by uku
- Very Many Players by ishland
- ViaFabricPlus by FlorianMichael
